title: Panga lebo za D3

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
<body>
  <script>
    const dataset = [12, 31, 22, 17, 25, 18, 29, 14, 9];

    const w = 500;
    const h = 100;

    const svg = d3
      .select('body')
      .append('svg')
      .attr('width', w)
      .attr('height', h);

    svg
      .selectAll('rect')
      .data(dataset)
      .enter()
      .append('rect')
      .attr('x', (d, i) => i * 30)
      .attr('y', (d, i) => h - 3 * d)
      .attr('width', 25)
      .attr('height', (d, i) => d * 3)
      .attr('fill', 'navy');

    svg
      .selectAll('text')
      .data(dataset)
      .enter()
      .append('text')
      .text(d => d)
      .attr('x', (d, i) => i * 30)
      .attr('y', (d, i) => h - 3 * d - 3);
    // Add your code below this line



    // Add your code above this line
  </script>
</body>

solutions.name: index
solutions.contents:
<body>
  <script>
    const dataset = [12, 31, 22, 17, 25, 18, 29, 14, 9];

    const w = 500;
    const h = 100;

    const svg = d3
      .select('body')
      .append('svg')
      .attr('width', w)
      .attr('height', h);

    svg
      .selectAll('rect')
      .data(dataset)
      .enter()
      .append('rect')
      .attr('x', (d, i) => i * 30)
      .attr('y', (d, i) => h - 3 * d)
      .attr('width', 25)
      .attr('height', (d, i) => d * 3)
      .attr('fill', 'navy');

    svg
      .selectAll('text')
      .data(dataset)
      .enter()
      .append('text')
      .text(d => d)
      .attr('x', (d, i) => i * 30)
      .attr('y', (d, i) => h - 3 * d - 3)
      .style('font-size', 25)
      .attr('fill', 'red');
  </script>
</body>

<body>
  <script>
    const dataset = [12, 31, 22, 17, 25, 18, 29, 14, 9];

    const w = 500;
    const h = 100;

    const svg = d3
      .select('body')
      .append('svg')
      .attr('width', w)
      .attr('height', h);

    svg
      .selectAll('rect')
      .data(dataset)
      .enter()
      .append('rect')
      .attr('x', (d, i) => i * 30)
      .attr('y', (d, i) => h - 3 * d)
      .attr('width', 25)
      .attr('height', (d, i) => d * 3)
      .attr('fill', 'navy');

    svg
      .selectAll('text')
      .data(dataset)
      .enter()
      .append('text')
      .text(d => d)
      .attr('x', (d, i) => i * 30)
      .attr('y', (d, i) => h - 3 * d - 3)
      .style('font-size', 25)
      .attr('fill', 'red');
  </script>
</body>

tests.text: Lebozote zinapaswa kuwa na rangi ya fill nyekundu.

description: D3 putanje mogu dodati stilove linijskim oznakama. Svojstvo elementa fill postavlja boju teksta za čvor text. Putanja style() postavlja pravila za CSS za druge stilove, kao što su font-family ili font-size.
instructions: Postavi font-size za elemente text da budu 25px, a boja teksta neka bude crvena.
